note: Fallback baseline for Apple Silicon when the chip tier cannot be resolved (or when a newer generation has no dedicated file yet). Mirrors the conservative M1 numbers and is extrapolated at ~1.15x the x86-laptop reference. Prefer the tier-specific apple-silicon-m{1,2,3,4}.json files; re-bless them on real hardware with `cyberwave edge bench --save-baseline apple-silicon-m{N}.json`.
